description_long: This is a compact, retro-style electric mixer with a glossy pink exterior and a metallic mixing bowl. The main body is constructed from molded plastic, featuring a curved handle integrated into the top for easy lifting. The mixing bowl is made of polished stainless steel and sits securely on a flat base, with visible beaters extending down from the head. A power cord extends from the rear, indicating its electric operation. The overall design is streamlined, with minimal external controls and a smooth, continuous chassis.
description: A glossy pink electric mixer with a stainless steel bowl and integrated handle, featuring a retro, streamlined design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pink body, metallic bowl, handle, and power cord.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rounded motor housing and the cord extending from the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the bowl, handle, and the cord trailing behind.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the open bowl and the beaters inside, with the handle and head above.
attribute_control_panel_type: single button or switch on the side, no visible digital display
attribute_chassis_design: enclosed body with integrated handle and flat base
